title: Core AI Fabric Recipe
description: A conversion recipe: everything needed to turn one upstream Hugging Face model into a provenance-verified .aimodel artifact. Recipes are the unit of contribution in coreai-fabric.

id.description: Recipe id. Doubles as the coreai-catalog model id at register time, so it must not collide with an existing catalog id.

revision.description: Upstream HF commit sha the recipe was authored against. Optional: leave absent if not resolved; convert re-resolves and pins the exact revision in the conversion manifest.

license.description: Upstream license identifier as declared by the upstream repo (e.g. the HF license tag).

license_terms.description: License triage. permissive = on the fabric allowlist; review_required = must be reviewed before publish; unknown = not yet triaged.

pipeline_tag.description: Upstream HF pipeline_tag at scaffold time (informational).

size_bytes.description: Upstream repo storage size in bytes as reported by the HF API at scaffold time (informational).

tool.description: Converter executable name (e.g. coreai-torch). Resolved on PATH at convert time.

min_tool_version.description: Minimum converter version known to work for this recipe. Leave absent if unknown.

args.description: Extra converter arguments passed through verbatim as --key value pairs.

quantization.description: Quantization scheme requested from the converter (e.g. none, palettized).

precision.description: Numeric precision requested from the converter (e.g. fp16, int4).

compute_units.description: Compute-units selector passed through to the converter. Opaque to fabric; the accepted vocabulary is defined by the installed Apple toolchain.

format_version.description: .aimodel format version the bundle is expected to declare. Leave absent if unknown.

bundle_files.description: Paths (relative to the .aimodel bundle root) that must exist after conversion. Checked by verify Gate A.

checks.description: Structural checks run offline by `coreai-fabric verify` (implementable without the Apple runtime).

metric.description: Numeric parity metric vs the upstream model. See docs/parity-protocol.md.

tolerance.description: Allowed slack below threshold before hard failure.

greedy_token_exact.description: LLMs only: additionally require greedy-decoded tokens to match the upstream exactly.

hf_target_namespace.description: The publisher's OWN Hugging Face namespace (user or org). Fabric never hosts weights.

repo_name.description: Target HF repo name for the published artifact.

catalog.description: Fields needed to generate the coreai-catalog entries at register time. Optional at draft stage; required before `coreai-fabric register`.

architecture.description: Mirrors the catalog model.schema architecture enum.

runner.description: Mirrors the catalog model.schema runner enum. Use unknown until verified on-device.

status.description: Pipeline stage. Advanced only by the corresponding fabric command.

published.description: Written back by `coreai-fabric publish` after a successful upload. Required when status is published or registered.

revision.description: HF commit sha of the published artifact repo.
